design_plan: rng=42; AIDA=pass; hero_math=1120px/2.3lines; density=grid-auto-flow:dense verified; labels=clean; buttons=contrast AA
headline: Super vs Grok — Personal AI Agents for Real Computer Work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Grok. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Grok

summary: A fair, evidence‑backed comparison of Super and Grok for people choosing a personal AI agent. Grok shines at real‑time data and voice experiences. Super is built for repeated computer‑use workflows with a reusable computer-use cache that lowers cost and friction over time.
